---
applyTo: "**/*.tsx,**/*.ts"
description: This file describes the React frontend code style for the project.
---

# React Coding Standards

## Components
- Use functional components only.
- Keep components under ~200 lines.

## Hooks
- Follow Rules of Hooks strictly.
- Use custom hooks for repeated logic.

## UI & Styling
- Prefer CSS modules or styled-components.
- Implement proper loading + error states for all async operations.
- use path design for all the ui components https://path-designsystem.elluciancloud.com/#/components/List 

## Testing
- Use Jest + React Testing Library.
